epics.title: Coach social win posts (parked — later cycle)
epics.description: Detect client highlights (e.g. overall score 63→74 in 30 days), generate templated social copy + branded image assets (Instagram-friendly sizes), email coach with download links and captions. Template placeholders only for MVP (no LLM required for copy). Privacy: opt-in / anonymisation. Design and template iteration should use the official Figma MCP server (Cursor) to automate creating/updating layout templates, components, and variables — then a fixed spec (layer names / placeholders) drives code-side image generation or export. Parked until after launch priorities — growth/visibility feature, not blocking revenue.

tasks.title: Define win rules (score delta, time window, dedupe) and data sources from assessments/sessions
Figma: set up social template file — feed (e.g. 1080×1080), story (e.g. 1080×1350), brand components, text styles aligned to design system
Figma MCP: use official Figma MCP + project figma-use / generate skills to build or revise template frames, components, and variables (automate repeatable template work)
Template contract: document placeholder layer/variable names and map each to app fields (scores, delta, period, anonymised client label, org name)
Image pipeline: implement generation from template spec (e.g. server render or export path), upload to Storage, issue short-lived signed download URLs
Resend: transactional email to coach with caption text + links to download assets per platform size
Coach consent / anonymisation settings for client-identifying marketing assets
Optional MVP: in-app preview and/or manual ‘generate post’ before email send

guardian.instructions: When a commit lands, scan the commit message for task IDs matching the pattern below. If found and the message contains a completion keyword, set that task status to done and record the commit SHA in a commitRef field on the task. Then recalculate meta.launchReadiness as (done tasks / total tasks) * 100 rounded to nearest 5. Update meta.lastUpdated to today and meta.updatedBy to guardian.
